title: Better_Torches
description: “A simple Minecraft texture pack that retextures only torches, giving them a cleaner, more detailed look while keeping the original game style.”
body:
Minecraft Torch Texture Pack
This simple texture pack retextures only the torches in Minecraft. Each torch has been redesigned for a cleaner, more detailed, and visually appealing look, keeping the classic Minecraft style intact. Perfect for players who want their torches to stand out without changing the rest of the game.

Features:

- Only torch textures are changed.

- Maintains original Minecraft gameplay and style.

- Compatible with most resource packs.
